about_col_1: Artakia was built on a simple belief: great artists deserve great support. We combine the reach of a major-distribution network with the intimacy and vision of an independent label.
about_col_2: Beyond music, we've evolved into a full creative collective spanning entertainment, studio, digital strategy, and creative production for artists, labels, and cultural brands ready to go global.
ma_col_1: Selective by design. We work with a few projects at a time, so each one gets the attention it needs, keeping us close to the artistic side, the business strategy and the music behind them.
bg_p_1: Artakia draws on time spent across four disciplines. We have worked in talent management, representing leading screen talent and understanding how reputation is built and protected. In media management, positioning talent and projects across press and public.
ma_col_2: An independent label music production studio, distributed globally through The Orchard, a Sony Music company.
bg_p_2: In social media marketing and audience building, building presence that holds over time. And in video production across every phase, from concept to final cut. Together these experiences gave us one place where talent management, story, strategy and production work as one.
about_lead: Most of what's needed to succeed already exists. The architecture is what's missing.

philosophy.title: Listening.
philosophy.desc: Understanding the feeling, before the form.

philosophy.title: Producing.
philosophy.desc: End to end, what the work calls for.

philosophy.title: Scaling.
philosophy.desc: Building infrastructure that lasts, beyond the moment.

hero_desc: A London creative studio across music, production and strategy. We help artists and brands work out what to build & build it.
phil_center: Every project starts with one question: what does this need to do? Data is not the opposite of art. It is the map that lets art travel further.

services.name:
Label &
Development
services.desc: M.A Records — a private label within Artakia. Developing artists from the ground up: A&R, creative direction, commercial strategy, release planning. Global distribution through The Orchard · Sony Music.

services.name:
Production &
Content
services.desc: Photo and video production for artists and brands. Full-cycle delivery — from concept and creative direction to final cut.

services.name:
Strategy &
Marketing
services.desc: The most requested. Figuring out what should happen — and in what order. Campaigns, releases, brand identity, digital growth. Diagnosing before prescribing.
